news.headline: 40 Hong Kong tour groups safe after magnitude 7.5 quake strikes Japan
news.summary:
Hong Kong travellers in Japan were reported safe by at least one major tour operator while the Immigration Department said it was closely monitoring the situation after a powerful earthquake struck off the country’s northeast coast on Monday, triggering tsunami warnings.

news.headline: Teen driving Tesla arrested after knocking second vehicle through storefront
news.summary:
Hong Kong police have arrested a 16-year-old garage worker for allegedly driving without a licence after he lost control of a Tesla car and crashed into a parked vehicle, pushing the latter through a property agency’s storefront and leaving an employee injured.
